hero.thesis: Generate social media-ready summaries of real estate listings from MLS text for realtors. Charge $19/month per agent. Automate the summarization process with AI to save time and boost agents' social media engagement.
hero.marketSize: There are over 1.5 million realtors in the U.S., and a significant portion use social media to promote listings, creating a substantial market for automated content solutions.
hero.payingEvidence: Realtors frequently pay for social media management tools and services, often spending $50-$300/month. A $19/month tool that automates social copy is an attractive offer.

actions.action: Interview 5 realtors about their social media processes.
Set up a landing page using Webflow to capture interest.
Draft a basic summarization algorithm using GPT-4 API.
Develop a basic user interface in Framer.
actions.success: UI allows paste and summarize functionality.

actions.action: Integrate GPT-4 with the UI for real-time summarization.
Test summarization accuracy with 5 different MLS texts.
Email early access users to test the MVP and provide feedback.
Implement top 3 feedback items into the MVP.
Conduct a second round of testing with revised MVP.
Draft a content marketing plan for LinkedIn and Instagram.
Create an explainer video using Loom.
actions.success: Video explains product in under 2 minutes.

actions.action: List 50 potential realtor clients for outreach.
Send personalized launch emails to 50 leads.
Post explainer video and first content post on LinkedIn and Instagram.
Host a live demo and Q&A session for interested realtors.
Create a 3-step onboarding tutorial using Notion.
Set up automated onboarding emails with ConvertKit.
actions.success: Emails cover all key features and benefits.

actions.action: Analyze user onboarding completion rates.
Collect data on common summarization errors from user feedback.
Refine algorithm to address top 3 errors.
Test refined product with 10 new MLS texts.
Identify 5 relevant Reddit subs and Discord servers.
Schedule weekly posts in these communities.
Reach out to 3 real estate influencers for partnerships.
Use Apollo to find 200 additional realtor emails.
Launch a referral program for existing users.
actions.success: Program offers 1 free month for each referral.

actions.action: Email 50 new leads with personalized pitches.
Set up a dedicated support channel on Discord.
Develop a FAQ and troubleshooting guide for common issues.
Host a monthly feedback session on Discord.
Review usage metrics and subscription data.
actions.success: Identify peak usage times and user drop-offs.

actions.action: Adjust pricing or features based on user data.
actions.success: Introduce a new feature based on demand.

actions.action: Update marketing strategies based on data insights.
Implement automation for customer support using n8n.
Develop a plan to hire a part-time developer.
Create a roadmap for the next six months.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Create a professional landing page without coding.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Manage email marketing and automate sequences.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: Find and reach out to potential leads.

firstTenCustomers.script:
Hi [Name],

I'm launching a tool that transforms MLS text into polished social media copy instantly. It's perfect for busy realtors like you who want to boost their online presence without the hassle. I'd love for you to be one of the first to try it out. Can I send you a quick demo?

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send initial email, follow-up after 3 days, then weekly.

pricing.growth: $49/month per office up to 5 agents, includes advanced analytics.
pricing.premium: $99/month per office up to 10 agents, includes customization options.
pricing.raisingRules: Increase prices by 20% after reaching 200 active users.

failureModes: Ignoring user feedback leads to churn.
Poor summarization accuracy results in low retention.
Inadequate customer support leads to negative reviews.
Failing to differentiate from competitors stalls growth.
Improper pricing strategy reduces perceived value.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to set up an LLC in Delaware for $500.
setup.payments: Collect payments via Gumroad for ease of use.
setup.contracts: Draft user terms and privacy policy with Lovable.
setup.insurance: No insurance needed for digital services at this stage.

scaling: Once you hit about $2,000 MRR, consider hiring a part-time developer to handle technical debt and new feature requests. Use platforms like Upwork or Toptal to find candidates. As you scale, automate more of your marketing and support tasks with tools like n8n. Consider a virtual assistant from a service like Belay for task management and scheduling. Finally, build a small sales team to handle outbound efforts and partnerships as you approach $5,000 MRR.
